creator: Stephane.DAlu@insa-lyon.fr
text:
when trying the patch:
make install FORCE_PKG_REGISTER=yes

I ran into these errors:
pkg-static:
lstat(/usr/ports/net-mgmt/collectd5/work/stage/notify_email.la): No such
file or directory
pkg-static:
lstat(/usr/ports/net-mgmt/collectd5/work/stage/notify_email.so): No such
file or directory
